title: Diagnose
body: Clarify the audience, offer, operational friction and measurable goal before choosing the visual or technical route.

title: Design
body: Turn brand, content and interface decisions into a reusable language for campaigns, pages and internal handoff.

title: Deploy
body: Ship the website, campaign, automation or asset pack in a way the team can actually operate.

title: Learn
body: Read the response, tighten the workflow and make the next iteration faster, clearer and easier to repeat.
